text:
Market today: Tech sentiment is shaky. Headlines are flagging elevated volatility in leading tech names and bubble-risk chatter from researchers. That's a direct headwind for your 90% tech/chip book, especially on margin where a fast drop costs you double.

Your holdings: PLTR is down 13% and flagged SELL — no stop trigger yet but it's bleeding. AVGO is your largest position, down 12% and flagged TRIM — that combo of size plus loss is your biggest dollar risk right now. PTNM is down 15% with a tight stop at $9.50 — tiny spec, small buffer, watch it daily. SPCX is a brand-new IPO with very limited data and a stop only $5.71 away — margin amplifies any gap-down hard.

Watch: Micron earnings are set to move the whole chip space — that hits AVGO and SMH directly. Also watch whether tech volatility headlines start pulling QQQ/SPY stops closer to your levels.

Bottom line: Your two biggest fires are AVGO (size + loss) and PLTR (loss + SELL tag) — decide on both before Micron moves the sector.
